mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memberinfo(id, password, name, gender, birth, mail, phone, address, regist_day) VALUES (#{id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birth}, #{mail}, #{phone}, #{address}, Now());
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, gender, birth, mail, phone, address, regist_day FROM memberInfo WHERE id = #{id};
mapper.update: UPDATE memberInfo SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birth = #{birth}, mail = #{mail}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address} where id = #{id};
